user.title: DashSnap
user.description: DashSnap base URL is auto-detected when possible and pre-filled below — confirm or edit it. Enter the host and port where DashSnap is running.

error.invalid_url: Enter a full URL with a valid scheme (http or https), host, and port.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach DashSnap at that URL. Check the host/port and that DashSnap is running.
error.app_unhealthy: Reached DashSnap, but the health check failed — verify DashSnap's targets configuration.

init.title: DashSnap
init.description: Change the DashSnap base URL if autodetection picked the wrong one. It is validated and health-checked before saving.

error.invalid_url: Enter a full URL with a valid scheme (http or https), host, and port.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach DashSnap at that URL. Check the host/port and that DashSnap is running.
error.app_unhealthy: Reached DashSnap, but the health check failed — verify DashSnap's targets configuration.

record.name: Record URL
record.description: Record any web page to video or screenshot via DashSnap. Provide a full URL.

url.name: URL
url.description: Full URL of the page to capture (must start with http or https).

target.name: Target
target.description: Named target from DashSnap config. Defaults to first configured target.

seconds.name: Duration (seconds)
seconds.description: Video length. Ignored when format is png.

format.name: Format
format.description: webm video or a single png screenshot.

record_ha.name: Record HA dashboard
record_ha.description: Record a Home Assistant page. Provide a path — the HA base URL is applied automatically from the target config.

path.name: Page path
path.description: HA route to capture, e.g. /lovelace/0 or /history.

target.name: Target
target.description: Named HA target from DashSnap config. Defaults to first configured target.

seconds.name: Duration (seconds)
seconds.description: Video length. Ignored when format is png.

format.name: Format
format.description: webm video or a single png screenshot.
